questions.statement:

In a certain code language, THEN is written as RLBS. Which word will be written as AEPJ in that code language?

The height of the mango tree and the coconut tree are the same. Banana tree is smaller than palm tree. The guava tree is shorter than the banana tree but taller than the mango tree. Which tree is the tallest?

<span style="">If &#39;-&#39; is multiplication, &#39;+&#39; is division, &#39;&nbsp;<strong>.&nbsp;</strong>&#39; is subtraction and &#39;&divide;&#39; is addition, then find the correct equation.</span><span style="display: none;">&nbsp;</span>

<p>Select the word that can be formed using the letters of the given word only as many times as the letters have been used in the word.</p>

<p>AUDEFGRSA</p>
Select the word that can be formed using the letters of the given word only as many times as the letters have been used in the word. A L B C I L A N O T P R O O

<p>Select the option that follows the words given below. Belongs to the category.</p>

<p>Cinema, Actor, Director</p>

In a class, there are 150 students and the number of boys is twice as much as the number of girls. One of the boys, Kunal, ranked 25th from the top and only 10 girls are ahead of Kunal. How many boys are there after him ?&nbsp;

options: Both conclusion I and II follow. /
Either conclusion I or II follows. /

questions.statement: A boy was asked to multiply a number by <span class="math-tex">\(\frac{7}{8}\)</span>. He multiplied the number by <span class="math-tex">\(\frac{17}{8}\)</span>&nbsp;and got 30 more than the correct answer. That number was

<p>Four options have been given, out of which three are alike in some manner and one is different. Select the number that is different from the rest.</p>

<p>720, 120, 24, 8, 2, 1, 1</p>

options: M is the father of L. /
M is the son of L /
Both Assumptions I and II are&nbsp;implicit. /

questions.statement: In a certain code language, CLOCK is written as KCOLC. How will RAMESHA be written as in that code language, What will be the first and last letters of that word?

options: Both I and II are implicit. /
Neither I nor II is implicit. /
Both conclusions I and II follow. /
Neither conclusion I nor II follows. /
Both conclusion I and II follow. /
Both conclusion II and III follow. /

options: Soil erosion is a result of mankind&#39;s unwise actions such as overgrazing or unsuitable cultivating practices. /
Planting provides a protective cover on land, and this allows most of the rain-water to soak into the ground&nbsp; /

questions.statement: In a certain code language, &#39;A&#39; is written as &#39;2&#39;,&nbsp;&#39;B&#39; is written as &#39;4&#39;&nbsp; and&nbsp;&#39;C&#39; is written as &#39;6&#39;. Which word will be coded as &#39;1210108&#39; as in that code language?

Select the fourth, seventh, eleventh and thirteenth letters of the word &#39;CATEGORISATION&#39; to form meaningful word(s). If only one word can be formed, then select the third letter of that word as the answer. If more than one word can be formed, then select M as the answer. If no such word can be formed, then select X as the answer.

<p>Which one of the following diagrams correctly depicts</p>

<p>brinjal, food, vegetable?</p>
A is the father of B. B is the brother of C. D is the mother of A. How is D related to C?
In a certain code language, INDUS is coded as 03865 and TENNIS is coded as 243305. How will STUDENT be coded in that language?
